title: Add realistic futuristic dark hero background image while preserving glassmorphism and text clarity

requirements.text: Generate a realistic, advanced-looking, futuristic dark full-screen hero background image and add it as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: in the background in the hero section add some advanced picture so it look real and futuristic and please maintain the glassy

acceptanceCriteria: A new generated image file exists at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-futuristic-dark-bg.dim_1920x1080.png
The generated image is visually dark, realistic, and futuristic (not flat/abstract-only), suitable for a full-screen hero background

requirements.text: Update the hero section to use the new generated futuristic dark background image as the base layer, while preserving the existing glassmorphism hero panel and ensuring the hero headline/subtext remain clearly readable on all viewport sizes.

quotes: in the background in the hero section add some advanced picture so it look real and futuristic and please maintain the glassy
make surue the text shuld be clear

acceptanceCriteria: Hero background renders the new static image at full-screen size behind the hero content (no tiling, maintains cover behavior, and remains visually crisp)
The glass-panel container remains glassmorphism (blur + translucent) and sits above the background image
Hero headline and subtext have sufficient contrast/legibility against the new background (no parts become hard to read on common desktop/mobile breakpoints)

Existing subtle animated background/parallax effects (AnimatedBackground + radial overlay) do not overpower the new image; they remain subtle or are appropriately blended/toned down so the image still reads as the primary background

requirements.text: Centralize the new hero background image reference in the shared frontend/src/config/assets.ts file and use that constant from the hero section implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/config/assets.ts exports a new constant for the generated futuristic dark hero background image URL
Hero section uses the exported constant rather than an inline hardcoded string path

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only).
Do not modify any paths listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Do not redesign other landing page sections beyond what is necessary to integrate the new hero background.
Do not add new backend APIs or change the Motoko backend state/schema.

required: Realistic futuristic dark full-screen background image with advanced sci-fi architectural/technological detail, cinematic lighting, and subtle depth (hero-futuristic-dark-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
